author: phase-4-coordinator
content:
Implemented by adding a new IntoShape trait and routing all distribution methods through it. Breaking change (pre-1.0 OK) — return type is now Array<T, IxDyn> instead of Array<T, Ix1>.

New module ferray-random/src/shape.rs with IntoShape trait. Implementations for usize (1-D), &[usize], [usize; N] (any N via const generics), &[usize; N], Vec<usize>, and &Vec<usize>. Rejects empty shape and zero-sized axes.

Updated every univariate distribution method to take size: impl IntoShape instead of size: usize:
- uniform.rs: random, uniform, integers
- normal.rs: standard_normal, normal, lognormal
- exponential.rs: standard_exponential, exponential
- gamma.rs: standard_gamma, gamma, beta, chisquare, f, student_t (also renamed 'shape: f64' alpha parameter to 'alpha' to avoid confusion with the new shape arg)
- misc_continuous.rs: laplace, logistic, rayleigh, weibull, pareto, gumbel, power, triangular, vonmises, wald, standard_cauchy
- discrete.rs: binomial, negative_binomial, poisson, geometric, hypergeometric, logseries (fixed name-shadowing bugs where 'let n = shape_size(...)' would have shadowed the trials parameter in binomial and negative_binomial)
- parallel.rs: standard_normal_parallel

Internal generator.rs helpers: new shape_size(), vec_to_array_f64(data, shape), vec_to_array_i64(data, shape) that build IxDyn arrays from a flat Vec and shape.

Usage:
  rng.random(10)           -> 1-D length 10
  rng.random([3, 4])       -> 2-D shape (3, 4)
  rng.random(&[2, 3, 4])   -> 3-D shape (2, 3, 4)
  rng.normal(0.0, 1.0, [100, 100])

Multivariate distributions (multinomial, multivariate_normal, dirichlet) are intentionally left unchanged because they already return 2-D arrays with a semantically distinct 'size' (number of samples) and adding N-D broadcasting over them doesn't match the NumPy API.

10 new tests in uniform.rs and normal.rs: shape from array/slice/vec, zero-axis rejection, determinism preserved between 1-D and reshaped N-D generation (proving the underlying BitGenerator state advances identically).

Adjacent cleanup of preexisting clippy warnings: 3 manual_range_contains in misc_continuous.rs/uniform.rs/property_tests.rs, 1 unused_import in property_tests.rs.

Result: 125 ferray-random lib tests pass (was 115, +10). Full workspace builds and tests pass. Clippy clean. Closing as completed.
